g.title: public.association:model_key->public.model:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key) REFERENCES model(model_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.association:model_key->public.class:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, association_class_key) REFERENCES class(model_key, class_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.association:model_key->public.class:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, from_class_key) REFERENCES class(model_key, class_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.association:model_key->public.class:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, to_class_key) REFERENCES class(model_key, class_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.association_uniqueness_attribute:model_key->public.association:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, association_key) REFERENCES association(model_key, association_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.association_invariant:model_key->public.association:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, association_key) REFERENCES association(model_key, association_key) ON DELETE CASCADE
